text.title: Tech Debt Sprint Template Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Tech Debt Sprint Template end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: list-debt-items
step.input: team backlog + lint output + retro carry-over
step.action: Enumerate <=5 debt items, each with size estimate (XS/S/M/L).

step.name: set-guardrails
step.action: Declare 'no new features', 'no migrations', freeze decisions.

step.name: daily-sync
step.action: 10-min sync: what shipped / what blocked / what cut.

step.name: retro-and-close
step.action: Compute deltas; write retro; bump version; sign last_reviewed.
